title: Review Remote Build Config Form Completeness
description: Session 6 added Tools > Remote Build Path Config with Check, Build/Upload, WhatIf Test Build, WhatIf Test Copy buttons. Review: Does Export-WorkspacePackage support the -Options hashtable as called? Are error paths comprehensive? Should WhatIf produce a downloadable report?
notes: Contemplation: Integration with existing Export-WorkspacePackage and Show-BuildPackageOptionsForm. Ensure no duplicate UX paths.
